title: The Two Faces of Dr. Jekyll
original_title: The Two Faces of Dr. Jekyll
overview: After a series of scientific experiments directed towards freeing the inner man and controlling human personalities, the kindly, generous Dr Henry Jekyll succeeds in freeing his own alter ego, Edward Hyde, a sadistic, evil creature whose pleasure is murder.
